唔知大家有冇聽過Humans of New York
佢係周圍做街訪嘅
FB有一千八百萬人follow!
佢地十月會黎香港
需要翻譯
幫手推比英文好嘅巴絲

Hello, Hong Kong! I'll be coming to the city for a few days in October, and am looking for an interpreter to help me gather stories! English fluency is obviously important, but you should also be comfortable with approaching and speaking to strangers! Interpretation experience is a plus. A fair rate will be paid, but most importantly the work is always a wonderful experience. If you're interested, please send an email to honyassist@gmail.com. Please put 'Hong Kong Interpreter' in the subject line. Include a short introductory video, along with any relevant experience.

https://www.facebook.com/102099916530784/posts/3416349315105811?sfns=mo
